refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify it remains within the customer-defined limit.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated network link with QoS prioritization for teleoperation data.
DP3: Real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment of transmission parameters.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
Dependency on real-time monitoring data for adaptation.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically encapsulates the solution to maintain packet loss within limits with minimal coupling to other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
Assumes availability of telemetry data for monitoring.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring (DP3) tightly with adaptive protocol to reduce latency and improve responsiveness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for teleoperation communication management, including protocol implementation and packet loss control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection used for teleoperation data transmission.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics such as packet loss.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands and task instructions.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the DP logically belongs here; low diffusion risk.
Broader module, less focused containment; higher diffusion risk due to mixed responsibilities.
Low containment; vehicle module is physical hardware focused.
Minimal relevance to communication protocol; high diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP to Teleoperation module centralizes communication protocol logic, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential dependency on Network Link module for physical layer changes.
Coordination needed with NGHE Solution for overall system integration.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts with Network Link and NGHE Solution to reduce integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP directly addresses the refined FR with clear mapping and measurable performance criteria.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as DP is contained within Teleoperation module.
Need to monitor dependencies on Network Link interface.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Teleoperation as the best IM boundary for this DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and network link monitoring within the Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility to Teleoperation module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Enhance interface definitions between Teleoperation and Network Link modules.
Consider adding monitoring sub-functions explicitly in FR refinement.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the FR, selects a suitable DP, and assigns it to an appropriate IM with manageable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; next step is to proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Telemetry data is available and reliable.
open_risks: Integration dependencies with Network Link module.
evidence_needed: Performance data from adaptive communication protocol under test network conditions.
